title: Authorise card payments synchronously
context: Card authorisation must complete before settlement is initialised.
decision: Perform synchronous authorisation against the issuer at capture time.

title: Tokenise stored credentials
context: Storing raw PANs widens the organisation's compliance scope.
decision: Tokenise all stored credentials at capture time.

title: Settle in batches overnight
context: Real-time settlement is costly for low-value card payments.
decision: Batch settlement of authorised payments on an overnight cycle.
